_comment: DERP map — ecotone-000 private relay (reference only)
Headscale distributes the embedded DERP map automatically to enrolled nodes via the
coordination protocol when derp.server.enabled: true. You do not need to load this file.
paths: [] in config.yaml ensures this file is NOT loaded — a region_id collision between
this file and the embedded server causes a headscale startup conflict.
This file is kept as a reference describing the embedded relay parameters.
STUN (UDP 3478) must be open on the photondatum.space firewall:
Verify relay reachability from any enrolled node:
curl http://127.0.0.1:8080/derp/probe   # must return: DERP ALIVE
